title: Kubecost Savings Recommendation
description: A savings recommendation for optimizing Kubernetes infrastructure costs, including cluster right-sizing and container request right-sizing suggestions.

clusterName.description: Name of the cluster the recommendation applies to.

namespace.description: Namespace of the workload (for container-level recommendations).

containerName.description: Name of the container (for container-level recommendations).

recommendedMonthlyRate.description: Recommended monthly cost rate after optimization.

monthlySavings.description: Estimated monthly savings from the recommendation.

currentNodeCount.description: Current number of nodes in the cluster (for cluster-level recommendations).

recommendedNodeCount.description: Recommended number of nodes (for cluster-level recommendations).

currentNodeType.description: Current node instance type (for cluster-level recommendations).

recommendedNodeType.description: Recommended node instance type (for cluster-level recommendations).

currentRAMBytesRequest.description: Current RAM request in bytes (for container-level recommendations).

recommendedRAMBytesRequest.description: Recommended RAM request in bytes (for container-level recommendations).
